messages.content: Turn off all lights, lock the doors, and set thermostat to 68F

I'll help you with those tasks right away.

<tool_call>tool: lights_off</tool_call>

<tool_call>tool: lock_doors</tool_call>

<tool_call>tool: set_thermostat, temp: 68</tool_call>

I've executed all three commands:
1. Turned off all the lights
2. Locked all the doors
3. Set the thermostat to 68°F

Your home is now secured and set to your preferred temperature.

description: Real LLM completion scenario on whatsapp
